ddls:
CREATE TABLE "design_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the pattern (e.g., Serial, Tuple, Serializable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pattern */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship (e.g., One-to-One, One-to-Many) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "cardinality" TEXT /* Cardinality of the relationship (e.g., 1:1, 1:N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern the example belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the example */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the example */,
  "code_snippet" TEXT /* Code snippet illustrating the example */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the example was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the example was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_examples_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES design_patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments from the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES design_patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, architect, admin) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_entity_relationships" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was established */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id", "relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_tags" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was assigned */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id", "tag_id")
)
